messages.meaning: Left engine oil pressure low. Normal range above 72% NG: 85–105 psi. Caution range: 40–85 psi. Below 40 psi is unsafe.
messages.immediate: Check oil pressure value. If 40–85 psi, reduce power and plan to land. If below 40 psi, use the engine shutdown in flight procedure.

messages.meaning: Left engine inter-turbine temperature (T5/ITT) above the applicable limit.
messages.immediate: Reduce power lever. If T5 cannot be maintained within limits, use the applicable engine shutdown in flight procedure.

messages.meaning: Right engine inter-turbine temperature (T5/ITT) above the applicable limit.
Left engine gas generator speed (NG) above the applicable limit.
messages.immediate: Reduce power lever. If NG cannot be maintained within limits, use the applicable engine shutdown in flight procedure.

messages.meaning: Right engine gas generator speed (NG) above the applicable limit.
Left engine fire or nacelle overheat detected.
messages.immediate: Maintain control, identify the affected engine, complete the engine fire memory/QRH sequence, isolate fuel, and discharge the extinguisher when directed.

messages.meaning: Right engine fire or nacelle overheat detected.
messages.immediate: As for L FIRE — right engine.

messages.meaning: One-engine-inoperative training cue used by scenario snapshots.
messages.immediate: Maintain directional control, set maximum allowable power on the live engine, confirm configuration and continue the applicable OEI procedure.

messages.meaning: Autofeather system selected or armed training cue.
messages.immediate: Confirm autofeather status as required by the phase of flight and applicable checklist.

messages.meaning: Battery system training cue. For legacy aircraft, battery overheat is a separate emergency/caution-light condition where fitted.
messages.immediate: Verify battery indication and electrical state. Use the applicable electrical or battery abnormal procedure.

messages.meaning: Compressor bleed valve failed to close/open normally, affecting available power or engine temperature response.
messages.immediate: Monitor torque/T5 and apply the applicable abnormal procedure.
